name: golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev
title: golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev
summary: sqlite3 driver for go that using database/sql
description:
sqlite3 driver for go that using database/sql
SQLite3 driver conforming to the built-in database/sql interface.
Currently, go-sqlite3 support following data types: null, integer,
float, blob, text and timestamp/datetime.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev because sqlite3 driver for go that using database/sql.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
